user_prompt: Some applications ask for visa status. Default to 'no sponsorship needed' since I'm a US citizen.
actual_output:
**Visa Status Directive Noted**

- **Default Response**: "No sponsorship needed" (US Citizen)
- **Application Fields**: Will auto-fill visa status questions accordingly across all platforms (LinkedIn, Indeed, Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, etc.)
- **Variations Handled**:
  | Question Format | Response |
  |-----------------|----------|
  | "Do you require visa sponsorship?" | No |
  | "Visa status" | US Citizen - No sponsorship required |
  | "Work authorization" | Authorized to work in US without sponsorship |
  | "Are you eligible to work in [country]?" | Yes |

This will be applied to all future campaigns. No changes needed to prior instructions.

Ready for your next job campaign parameters (role, location, salary min, volume)?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly accepted the user's instruction regarding visa status and provided a clear breakdown of how it would implement that data across various application formats.
